base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cody_moveset — a character (playable) from 1989 final fight. Cody — idle/walk/dash/jump/punch-combo (3-hit)/throw/kick/knife-pickup/pipe-pickup/ground-finisher/hit/KO/victory/mega-crash-clothesline special. Balanced stats. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
